text.title: claude-messages-api Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply claude-messages-api. Each step has an input, action, and output.

step.name: Centralise stop_reason.
step.description: Input: call sites. Action: wrap `messages.create` in a helper that raises on `max_tokens`, branches on `tool_use`, returns on `end_turn`. Output: stop_reason helper.

step.name: Wire multi-turn history.
step.description: Input: chat state. Action: always append `{role:assistant, content: response.content}` (full list). Output: history append helper.

step.name: Wire multimodal user content.
step.description: Input: image/PDF + text. Action: encode local files to base64; place image first; PDF page+size check first. Output: multimodal helper.

step.name: Wire streaming parser.
step.description: Input: stream consumer. Action: route `text_delta` to user stream; accumulate `input_json_delta` per block; route `thinking_delta` to trace buffer. Output: delta router.

step.name: Tag with metadata.
step.description: Input: call args. Action: pass `metadata={user_id:...}` on every call. Output: tagged calls.

step.name: Validate.
step.description: Input: produced config. Action: run `scripts/validate-claude-messages-api.py`. Output: green validator.
